raw.message: There are more chances to win than ever at the Gala Rewards Club.

hook.summary: A woman's yellow jumpsuit inflates as she interacts with a rewards app on a bus.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a yellow jumpsuit looks at her phone; the suit begins to puff out significantly.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Get in on that Gala joy.

scene_flow: A woman on a bus checks her phone and sees a Gala rewards notification.
Her yellow jumpsuit inflates to a massive size, causing her to take up the whole aisle.
She bounces out of the bus and down a residential street.
The Gala logo is displayed against a bright yellow background.
A responsible gambling message appears on a black screen.
on_screen_text: WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
audience_proxy: Adults in the UK interested in casual mobile gaming and betting apps.
